title: athyrium scandicinum
intro: Athyrium scandicinum, also known as the Himalayan Lady fern or Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Athyrium scandicinum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
